headline: A Look At Packaging Corporation Of America (PKG) Valuation As Recent Returns Diverge From DCF Estimates
summary: What recent performance data says about Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves and updated return figures, prompting a closer look at how the stock has behaved over different time frames. Over the past day, the stock declined 1.37%, while it gained 1.59% across the past week and 7.34% over the past month. headline: Packaging Corporation of America Announces 20% Dividend Increase
summary: LAKE FOREST, Ill., May 12, 2026--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) announced today that it intends to increase the quarterly cash dividend on its common stock to an annual payout of $6.00 per share from $5.00 per share, a 20% increase. The first quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share will be paid to shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026 with a payment date of July 15, 2026.
